creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port depended on a very old gsasl shlib version. Adjust the
dependency to gsasl.16, which is the current version in ports. Feel
free not to bump PORTREVISION, as GSASL is off by default.

Port maintainer (goran.tal@gmail.com) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: CVS)
